title: Flower-Salute.
content:
This nosegay, 'twas I dress'd it, 

    Greets thee a thousand times!
    Oft stoop'd I, and caress'd it,

    Ah! full a thousand times,
    And 'gainst my bosom press'd it

    A hundred thousand times!
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Flower-Salute."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
